title: Refactor an over-nested <%= if %> into :if attributes
prompt: Write lib/my_app_web/live/order_card_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.OrderCardLive). Render an order card with conditional sections: status badge (if @order.status), tracking block (if @order.tracking_code), refund notice (if @order.refunded). All three must use :if attributes on the containing HTML element, not nested <%= if %> blocks. mount/3 assigns a default order map.
tier_rationale: Requires applying :if to multiple elements — common but still a multi-site change.
